name: Marathi
register: Reverent contemporary Marathi Scripture register, matching the Bible Society of India Marathi Reference Bible (मराठी बायबल) and its beloved पिता-address tradition (as in Pandita Ramabai's translation of the Lord's Prayer), with the plainer accessibility of the मराठी सुबोध भाषांतर / Common-Language edition. Warm and personal without slipping into the colloquial बाप; पिता is simultaneously the tender and the honorific word a Marathi believer uses for God.
quote_convention: Double quotation marks “…” for direct speech; nested speech in single ‘…’. Sentences close with the full stop (।/danda reserved for poetry and set liturgical lines).
poetry_convention: Psalms and prophetic poetry set as broken parallel lines (couplets), each poetic line on its own line with the second colon indented — following BSI Marathi poetic layout.

glossary.note: Divine name. स्वर्गीय पिता is the fixed Marathi Bible phrase for the Father in heaven; carries pit-stem for conformance.
Primary filial divine name; vocative आमच्या पित्या in address. NEVER देव or परमेश्वर — those are the reversion contrast terms.
Definite sense carried by bare पिता (Marathi has no article); the standing title of God-as-Father, distinct from generic देव.
Filial title without the possessive; same wording family as आमचा स्वर्गीय पिता.

Anchored to मराठी BSI (Rom 8:15 / Mk 14:36) — the established rendering this language's church already prays; FHB shifts only the person (our), never the construction. Was: "अब्बा, पित्या". Sweep 2026-07-22 (Kevin: mine the existing translations, don't invent)
REVERSION TOKEN — generic deity (Elohim). Non-filial contrast term; never a substitute for पिता.
REVERSION TOKEN — Marathi Bible's rendering of the covenant name YHWH. Distinct from प्रभु (the title 'Lord' for Jesus) and from filial पिता.
Standard Marathi Bible term.

glossary.gloss: our Father's Spirit / the Spirit of our Father
glossary.note: Relational genitive (पित्याचा), not identity; carries the pit-stem, contrasting with the by-title पवित्र आत्मा.
Standard Marathi Bible Christological title.
पुत्र (not colloquial मुलगा) is the reverent Bible word for the Son.
Retains traditional देवाचा पुत्र. Reviewer to confirm against the filial alternative पित्याचा पुत्र (the Father's Son).
Standard Marathi rendering of monogenēs (John 3:16); warmer and more accurate than एकजात/एकुलता alone.
FHB renders 'kingdom of God' filially — पित्याचे राज्य, not देवाचे राज्य; carries the pit-stem.
Standard Marathi Bible spelling.
Standard; येशू ख्रिस्त = Jesus Christ.
Transliterated title used in Marathi Bible where 'Messiah' is retained distinct from the translated ख्रिस्त.
Standard Marathi Bible term (नवा करार = New Covenant).
Renders Hebrew hesed as the Marathi Bible's lovingkindness compound. Reviewer to confirm against the more literal स्थिर प्रेम (steadfast love).
कळवळा is the visceral Marathi word ('moved in the bowels'), matching racham / splanchnizomai better than the cooler करुणा.
Standard Marathi Bible term.
Fixed Marathi Bible phrase in John 3:16.
Marathi Bible wording for John 3:3,7; नव्याने preserves the anōthen double sense (again / from above).
